title: Connections, Channels, Heartbeats, Errors, and Recovery · Type-System Trace: Reconnect Backoff Jitter
summary: A service opens one TCP connection per message, shares one channel across unrelated concurrent owners, disables heartbeats, retries instantly, and redeclares consumers before topology or credentials recover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the reconnect backoff jitter increment in connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reconnect with bounded exponential backoff, jitter, cancellation, credential refresh, readiness, and a single recovery owner.
Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Reconnect Backoff Jitter · Theory Reconnect Backoff Jitter
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 5468 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound heartbeat and reconnect policy while rejecting stale channel-generation callbacks; retain duplicate-safe identity through every ambiguous handoff; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Reconnect with bounded exponential backoff, jitter, cancellation, credential refresh, readiness, and a single recovery owner.
